name: IdsEdwDntlCatRuleTierDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in AS (SELECT D.DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, D.DNTL_CAT_ID, D.DNTL_CAT_RULE_ID, D.TIER_NO, D.DNTL_CAT_RULE_SK, D.ACCUM_NO, D.COINS_PCT_AMT, D.MAX_ALW_AMT, D.MAX_ALW_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER D LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_out AS (SELECT DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, DNTL_CAT_ID, DNTL_CAT_RULE_ID, TIER_NO AS DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DNTL_CAT_RULE_SK, ACCUM_NO AS DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_ACCUM_NO, COINS_PCT_AMT AS DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_CO_PCT_AMT, MAX_ALW_AMT AS DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_MAX_ALW_AMT, MAX_ALW_NO AS DNTL_CAT_RULE_TIER_MAX_ALW_NO, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_in) SELECT * FROM cte_out
